items.title: Barça's Yamal out for season; WC not in peril
items.summary: Barcelona have confirmed that Lamine Yamal will miss the rest of the season with injury, but is expected to be available for this summer's World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Mets’ Francisco Lindor goes on injured list with more extreme calf injury than Juan Soto’s
items.summary: Manager Carlos Mendoza said Lindor will be "down for quite a bit here.”
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Gaikwad dedicates CSK's 103-run win against MI to Mukesh Choudhary
items.summary: The left-arm seamer played his part in CSK's win against MI following the death of his mother on Tuesday
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
